doc_title: Pseudonymisation Under the GDPR — EDPB Guidelines 01/2025
label: fabricated
reason: The EDPB has not published Guidelines 01/2025 on Pseudonymisation as of January 2025, and no such document appears in official EDPB records.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB has not published Guidelines 01/2025 on Pseudonymisation; the January 2025 date is too recent, the document numbering/formatting is inconsistent with actual EDPB guidelines, and no such public consultation appears in official records.
